_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement)

title: Risk Management Status Report
summary: This document outlines the Contractor's Risk Management Status Report, detailing progress in risk identification, mitigation planning, implementation, and tracking to aid management decisions.
use_relationship:
The Contractor's Risk Management Status Report will be used to document the contractor's progress for: risk identification; risk mitigation planning: risk management plan implementation; and risk tracking. This data will allow management to make informed decisions.
This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format, content, and preparation instructions for the data product resulting from the work task specified in the contract.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: The Risk Management Report shall be in contractor's format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content.
preparation_instructions.content: The report shall contain a title page identifying the following:

children.title: Contract Number and Dates of Award (including the latest modification)
All dates inclusive to the tasks for the reporting period.
The report shall contain the contractor's progress in risk identification, analysis, implementation of mitigation, and tracking.

The report shall identify efforts made in assessing the current consequence of the identified performance (P), schedule (S), and cost (C) risks on the program, and shall contain a projection of the risk mitigation implementation.

The report shall contain a five (5) by five (5) matrix to identify risks to Performance (P), Schedule (S), and Cost (C). A vertical axis shall indicate the "Likelihood" and the horizontal axis shall indicate the "Consequence" of a root cause occurrence. The level of risk for each root cause shall be identified as green low, yellow for moderate, or red for high.

The report shall contain a narrative briefly describing the risk, title, type (P, S, or C), root cause, current mitigations, and planned mitigations efforts identified, along with critical dates (risk reduction milestones).

preparation_instructions.title: Media requirements.
preparation_instructions.content: The report shall be presented in electronic media, MS Word version 2003-2007.
